# Seam Inventory Report
# Generated by `xtask seam-inventory`

## InputLifecycleMachine
  InputLifecycleNotice                     Local      no-owner-realization Local projection — no ownership boundary
  RecordTerminalOutcome                    Local      no-owner-realization Local projection — records terminal outcome locally
  RecordRunAssociation                     Local      no-owner-realization Local projection — records run association locally
  RecordBoundarySequence                   Local      no-owner-realization Local projection — records boundary sequence locally

## RuntimeControlMachine
  ResolveAdmission                         Local      no-owner-realization Local admission resolution mechanics
  SignalWake                               Local      no-owner-realization Local wake signal — no ownership boundary
  SignalImmediateProcess                   Local      no-owner-realization Local processing signal — no ownership boundary
  EmitRuntimeNotice                        External   surface-result-alignment External notice — surface must emit event matching machine state
  ResolveCompletionAsTerminated            External   surface-result-alignment External terminal — surface must represent termination accurately
  ApplyControlPlaneCommand                 External   owner-realization-only External command execution — shell applies but no feedback to machine
  InitiateRecycle                          Local      owner-realization-only Local recycle — shell executes recycle mechanics

## RuntimeIngressMachine
  IngressAccepted                          External   surface-result-alignment External signal — surface must confirm ingress acceptance
  InputLifecycleNotice                     Local      no-owner-realization Local lifecycle projection — drives InputLifecycleMachine locally
  WakeRuntime                              Local      no-owner-realization Local wake signal — no ownership boundary
  RequestImmediateProcessing               Local      no-owner-realization Local processing request — no ownership boundary
  CompletionResolved                       External   surface-result-alignment External completion — surface must represent resolution accurately
  IngressNotice                            External   surface-result-alignment External notice — surface must emit matching event
  SilentIntentApplied                      External   surface-result-alignment External signal — surface must represent silent intent accurately

## OpsLifecycleMachine
  NotifyOpWatcher                          Local      no-owner-realization Local channel notification — no ownership boundary crossed
  RetainTerminalRecord                     Local      no-owner-realization Local bookkeeping — retain completed op record
  EvictCompletedRecord                     Local      no-owner-realization Local bookkeeping — evict completed op record
  WaitAllSatisfied                         Local      owner-realization-plus-feedback Barrier satisfaction signal — must feed into TurnExecution barrier
  CollectCompletedResult                   Local      no-owner-realization Local result collection — no ownership boundary
  ConcurrencyLimitExceeded                 External   surface-result-alignment External signal — surface must represent concurrency rejection accurately

## ExternalToolSurfaceMachine
  ScheduleSurfaceCompletion                External   owner-realization-plus-feedback Shell must schedule completion AND feed back result via SurfaceCallCompleted
  RefreshVisibleSurfaceSet                 Local      no-owner-realization Local projection — refreshes cached tool set
  EmitExternalToolDelta                    External   surface-result-alignment External delta — surface must stream tool output matching machine state
  CloseSurfaceConnection                   External   owner-realization-only Shell closes connection — no feedback expected by machine
  RejectSurfaceCall                        External   surface-result-alignment External rejection — surface must represent rejection accurately

## TurnExecutionMachine
  RunStarted                               External   surface-result-alignment External signal: surface must emit run-started event matching machine truth
  DrainCommsInbox                          Local      owner-realization-only Shell executes comms drain mechanics; no feedback expected by this machine
  CheckCompaction                          Local      owner-realization-only Shell checks compaction threshold; no feedback expected by this machine

## MobLifecycleMachine
  EmitLifecycleNotice                      External   surface-result-alignment External notice — surface must represent mob lifecycle accurately

## FlowRunMachine
  EmitFlowRunNotice                        External   surface-result-alignment External notice — surface must represent flow run state accurately
  EmitStepNotice                           External   surface-result-alignment External notice — surface must represent step state accurately
  AppendFailureLedger                      Local      no-owner-realization Local persistence — no ownership boundary
  PersistStepOutput                        Local      no-owner-realization Local persistence — no ownership boundary
  ProjectTargetSuccess                     External   surface-result-alignment External projection — surface must represent target success accurately
  ProjectTargetFailure                     External   surface-result-alignment External projection — surface must represent target failure accurately
  ProjectTargetCanceled                    External   surface-result-alignment External projection — surface must represent target cancellation accurately

## MobOrchestratorMachine
  EmitOrchestratorNotice                   External   surface-result-alignment External notice — surface must represent orchestrator state accurately

## CommsDrainLifecycleMachine
  SpawnDrainTask                           Local      owner-realization-plus-feedback Shell must spawn task AND feed back TaskSpawned/TaskExited
  SetTurnBoundaryDrainSuppressed           Local      no-owner-realization Local projection — sets atomic flag observable by turn loop
  AbortDrainTask                           Local      owner-realization-plus-feedback Shell must abort task AND feed back AbortObserved

## Summary
  Total Local/External effects:           44
  no-owner-realization:                   18
  owner-realization-only:                 5
  owner-realization-plus-feedback:        4
  surface-result-alignment:               17

## Seams Requiring Formal Handoff Protocols
  OpsLifecycleMachine :: WaitAllSatisfied
  ExternalToolSurfaceMachine :: ScheduleSurfaceCompletion
  CommsDrainLifecycleMachine :: SpawnDrainTask
  CommsDrainLifecycleMachine :: AbortDrainTask
